hindi: जय पार्वती जय उमा माता। शिव की अर्धांगिनी सुखदाता॥
english: Victory to Parvati, victory to Uma Mata; consort of Shiva, giver of happiness
roman: Jai Parvati Jai Uma Mata, Shiv Ki Ardhangini Sukh Data

hindi: हिमालय पुत्री गिरिजा माता। जग जीवन की तुम विधाता॥
english: Daughter of Himalaya, Girija the Mother; you are the creator of life in the world
roman: Himalay Putri Girija Mata, Jag Jeevan Ki Tum Vidhata

hindi: गणेश कार्तिकेय की माता। भक्त जनों की सब सुखदाता॥
english: Mother of Ganesha and Kartikeya; giver of all joy to devotees
roman: Ganesh Kartikeya Ki Mata, Bhakt Janon Ki Sab Sukh Data

hindi: तपस्या से शिव को पाया। जग को शिव-शक्ति मिलाया॥
english: Through penance she attained Shiva; uniting Shiva and Shakti for the world
roman: Tapasya Se Shiv Ko Paya, Jag Ko Shiv Shakti Milaya

hindi: दुर्गा काली और भवानी। तुम्हीं हो अनेक नाम रानी॥
english: Durga, Kali and Bhavani; you are the queen of many names
roman: Durga Kali Aur Bhavani, Tumhin Ho Anek Naam Rani

hindi: पार्वती चालीसा जो गावे। वैवाहिक सुख और शांति पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Parvati Chalisa; attains marital happiness and peace
roman: Parvati Chalisa Jo Gaave, Vaivahik Sukh Aur Shanti Paave

hindi: जय जय पार्वती माता रानी। शिव की प्रिया जग की दानी॥
english: Victory to Parvati Mata the queen; beloved of Shiva, giver to all the world
roman: Jai Jai Parvati Mata Rani, Shiv Ki Priya Jag Ki Dani
